summary: US federal lobbying & money-in-politics (LDA filings, LD-203 contributions, congressional press).

external_sources.name: FEC
external_sources.why: campaign-finance denominator (lobbyist $ as share of receipts)

anomaly_rules: round-number million income, self-referential registrant/client, many unrelated issue codes, income>>peers (see mapper anomaly).
engine_notes: Use lobbying-influence-mapper for model/discover/verify; amendment-aware de-dup before any spend aggregate.
